entity.summary: BNB Chain stable-swap decentralized exchange focused on low-slippage swaps for stable and similarly priced assets, with current liquidity and active recent DEX volume.
entity.notes: The current first-party website remains reachable. DefiLlama identifies Ellipsis Finance as a BNB Chain StableSwap DEX and reports substantial current TVL together with non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume.

evidence.title: Ellipsis Finance official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website remains reachable and preserves the official Ellipsis Finance identity.

evidence.title: Ellipsis Finance metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Registry identifies Ellipsis Finance as a BNB Chain StableSwap DEX and reports current TVL plus non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume.

evidence.title: Ellipsis Finance DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently preserves Ellipsis Finance as a BNB Chain decentralized exchange.
